title: `runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1` on `SELECT`
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1, NULL::VARCHAR(50) AS c2 FROM t1 WHERE c1 > 0;
SELECT v1.c1, t1.c2 FROM v1 RIGHT OUTER JOIN t1 ON v1.c1 = t1.c1 WHERE v1.c2 IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM v1 WHERE v1.c1 = t1.c1);
key_bug_features: RIGHT OUTER JOIN with NULL view causing index out of range
